answer_box.snippet: Most travelers spend 4 to 5 days in Hong Kong to cover the main sights without rushing.

knowledge_graph.description: Hong Kong is a special administrative region on China's south coast, known for its skyline, harbour, and Lantau Island.

organic_results.title: Top 10 attractions in Hong Kong
organic_results.snippet: Must-sees include Victoria Peak, Tian Tan Buddha (Big Buddha) on Lantau Island, Hong Kong Disneyland, and the Star Ferry.

organic_results.title: Hong Kong Disneyland: full-day guide
organic_results.snippet: Set aside a whole day for Hong Kong Disneyland. A standard 1-day adult ticket costs about HK$639 (roughly INR 6,800).

organic_results.title: Victoria Peak Tram and Sky Terrace
organic_results.snippet: The Peak Tram plus Sky Terrace 428 combo is around HK$148 (about INR 1,600); plan roughly 2 hours.
